abilities.description: Summons a powerful Spirit Bear companion that can equip items. If the bear moves 1100 distance away from the Lone Druid, it cannot attack. Lone Druid suffers 20% of his max health as backlash damage if the Spirit Bear dies. Spirit Bear has the Return, Demolish, and Entangling Roots abilities.
params: Passive ComponentMax Health as Backlash Damage: 20%Health Bonus per Hero Level: 100Attack Damage Bonus per Hero Level: 5
Attack Damage Bonus per Hero Level: 5
abilities.name: Summon Spirit Bear
abilities.story: Sylla's lifelong companion is symbiotic with his spirit and heart, coming to aid him in any time of need.

abilities.description: Links Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear, sharing a percentage of their armor with each other, increasing the attack speed of both and causing damage dealt by the Spirit Bear to heal Lone Druid.
params: Passive ComponentAttack Speed Bonus: 20/35/50/65Shared Lifesteal: 20%/35%/50%/65%Shared Armor: 8%/12%/16%/20%
abilities.aghanim_shard: Lone Druid severs the link to his Spirit Bear, and connects to the target allied hero, sharing the Spirit Link bonuses with them for 20s. Armor sharing and attack speed bonuses are increased by 35%. Damage done by the ally heals Lone Druid, as well as the other way around. The Spirit Bear is feared for the duration of the transformation, unless it has its own Aghanim's Scepter.
abilities.name: Spirit Link
abilities.aghanim_scepter: Lone Druid severs the link to his Spirit Bear, and connects to the target allied hero, sharing the Spirit Link bonuses with them for 20s. Armor sharing and attack speed bonuses are increased by 35%. Damage done by the ally heals Lone Druid, as well as the other way around. The Spirit Bear is feared for the duration of the transformation, unless it has its own Aghanim's Scepter.
abilities.story: Sylla is emboldened by the presence of his companion, his vitality replenished with each swipe of the Spirit Bear's claws.

abilities.description: Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear roar fiercely causing nearby enemies to flee towards their base in terror. Their movement speed is increased by 20%.
abilities.name: Savage Roar
abilities.story: Sylla studies and masters the arts of the lost Bear Clan, enhancing his attunement with the wild.

abilities.description: Increases the power of the Spirit Bear, causing it to deal more damage to buildings and have additional spell resistance.
abilities.name: Demolish

abilities.description: Attacks have a chance to cause roots to burst from the ground, immobilizing the attacked enemy unit, and dealing damage per second.
abilities.name: Entangling Claws

abilities.description: Lone Druid learns to morph himself into a raging bear, losing his ranged advantage, but gaining increased bonus armor and health, and improved versions of Entangling Claws and Demolish.
params: Passive ComponentCooldown Skip on Transformation Time Death: 100%
Cooldown Skip on Transformation Time Death: 100%
abilities.name: True Form
abilities.story: The mighty bear is the king of the forest, possessing the throne through raw power.

abilities.description: Channels for 3 seconds and then teleports the Spirit Bear back to the Lone Druid.
abilities.name: Return

abilities.description: Increases the power of the Spirit Bear, causing it to deal more damage to buildings and have additional spell resistance.
abilities.name: Demolish

abilities.description: Lone Druid and the Spirit Bear roar fiercely causing nearby enemies to flee towards their base in terror. Their movement speed is increased by 20%.
abilities.name: Savage Roar

abilities.description: Attacks have a chance to cause roots to burst from the ground, immobilizing the attacked enemy unit, and dealing damage per second.
abilities.name: Entangling Claws

abilities.description: Grabs the Target Ally, Enemy or Rune, and uncontrollably drags them to Lone Druid for the duration. Enemies receive damage every 0.5s. When dragging a unit, they are rooted and the Spirit Bear is slowed by 2.5.
abilities.name: Fetch

abilities.description: The Spirit Bear is a Universal creep-hero unit. The bear cannot gain experience, but its health and damage increase with Lone Druid's level by 90 and 5 respectively.
params: Attack Damage Bonus per Hero Level: 5
abilities.name: Universal Unit

description: Commands a powerful spirit bear in battle. Chosen by the forces of nature for his profound wisdom, Sylla is all that remains of his forgotten clan. The Lone Druid is followed by his Spirit Bear, a powerful companion that Entangles enemies, and Demolishes structures. The sound of a Savage Roar is often all that's needed to frighten foes from the forest. If not, then the pair synergies a Spirit Link, increasing their speed and endurance as they roam the lands for intruders. Man or bear, the distinction is not always clear. When the situation calls for it, the Lone Druid takes his True Form, and joins the mêlée to fight claw-to-claw alongside his bear.  Carry Pusher Durable  Arachnophobic, Bearded, Fuzzy, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Lone Druid's original name was "Syllabear", a pun on the name of "Syl-lab-le", one of the developers who worked with Guinsoo. Before retiring, he created this hero.[1] It has now been shortened to "Sylla".
